create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the organization was created

directory_customer_id.description: Customer ID used for directory-related operations in Google Workspace

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the organization resource in configurations

lifecycle_state.description: Current state of the organization, e.g., active or deleted

name.description: Resource name for the organization, useful for API calls

org_id.description: Organization ID for managing resources within the hierarchy
